## xsh connect

Connect SSH.

### Synopsis

Create an SSH connection with the specified server.

```
xsh connect [host name] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help      help for connect
  -p, --print     Just print connection string, instead of connecting with the host
  -v, --verbose   Create ssh connection in verbose mode
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -d, --debug   Enable debug logging
```
